text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Buckle up! Time for a one-on-one!

Hearing a spirited voice echoing from the direction of the pool, I
decide to go take a look.

There I find two clusters of students buzzing excitedly around Hishi
Amazon and Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hello, Trainer! Did you come to watch this month's "Battle of the
Dorms: Pool Edition" too?
choice_data_list: There are dorm battles? And editions?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This one's a competition to decide which dorm's in
charge of cleaning the pool!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha. It might be nice to clean it together once in a while as well.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nope, the loser's gotta do it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I mean, don't get me wrong. It's not that I don't like cleaning, even if it is hard work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But as the proud leader of the Miho Dorm, I'll be damned if I lose to
my Ritto counterpart!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Woo, that's our Hishiama! You've got this one in the bag! Hope you're
ready, Ritto Dorm!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. I should have known you'd see it that way, Hishiama.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not that I don't share your sentiment. I couldn't bear to dampen the
spirits of my darling ponies any further.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: As head of Ritto Dorm, I shall rise up to this challenge!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Squee! You're the absolute coolest, Fuji! Get out there and show those Miho Dorm scrubs who's boss!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's see how we'll be battling it out!

With that, a student comes running over holding five strips of paper,
each bearing a potential challenge.

Tasked with deciding the theme for their match, Amazon selects one
of the slips...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?! A-a pop quiz showdown?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Of all the things... That's the type of contest she struggles
with the most!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Talk about a lucky break! Fuji's got everything—including brains!
Miho Dorm doesn't stand a chance. Ritto's practically won already!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Argh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: No... You never know until you try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna throw in the towel before we even start! It's you and
me, Fuji—one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I had a feeling you'd say that! Then without further ado, let's
get this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hello, hello! You'll need a neutral party to ask the questions, and
since I don't belong to Miho or Ritto, I'll do the honors!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for agreeing to help us, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, think nothing of it. This is fun for me too! ♪ Now then, let's kick
things off with our first question!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
When too many people are involved in managing or making a
decision, it can end up complicating matters. In other words, "Too
many cooks"...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, me! Me, me, me, me, me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: My, that was fast! Hishiama, your answer, if you please!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh. So basically, it's bad news when there's no clear leader to rally
behind, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In that case... everyone can just follow me! I'll take any and all under
my wing! That's my answer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That sounds just like you. But as much as I adore your
response, I'm sorry to say it's incorrect.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hmm. I believe the answer is "Too many cooks spoil the broth." Right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Correct! That's one point for Fuji! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What?! Dammit... Bring on the next one!

Although Amazon is consistently first to buzz in, she nevertheless
answers each question incorrectly, causing the point gap to gradually
widen.
However...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Here comes the final question! "Many drops make a shower"—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Awww yeeeah! Me, me, meee!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: The answer is "Every little bit helps"!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Ding, ding, ding! That's one-hundred percent correct,
Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
By the way, the full question was, "'Many drops make a shower.' What
is the meaning of this proverb?"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha, how 'bout them apples? I'm not too shabby at English lit!
Plus, I just came across that phrase the other day—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I taught you that proverb when I was helping you study for your
makeup exam. I'm so glad you remembered it, Hishiama! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sh-shut it! I still got the answer right!

In the end, Amazon only answers that one question correctly, and the
match ends in a landslide victory for Fuji and the Ritto Dorm.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I can't believe I lost!
Sorry, guys! I was totally useless out there...

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No! That's not true at all!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You refused to give up even when things weren't going your way, and
you kept fighting right up to the very last moment. It seriously lit a
fire in my heart!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Really? Hehe! You sure know how to make a gal blush.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, a loss is a loss. Let's get that pool spick and span! I'll spearhead
the scrubbing, so try to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you can bet I won't lose to Fuji next time around! I'll have my
revenge—just you wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...
choice_data_list: (That's what I call a great personality!)

text_block_list.text:
I leave with a striking impression of Hishi Amazon as someone who
refuses to run away, no matter the situation.
